name: guardcardcheck
description: GuardCardCheck.com — 10-State Security Guard License Verification Platform

scripts.dev: nodemon --legacy-watch --watch server.js --watch routes --watch services --watch config --watch middleware --watch db --watch public server.js
scripts.dev:stripe: concurrently "nodemon --legacy-watch --watch server.js --watch routes --watch services --watch config --watch middleware --watch db --watch public server.js" "stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/billing/webhook"
